evals.prompt: Show me everything that's installed and available — skills, agents, MCP servers, plugins. I want a full catalog of what I can use.
evals.expected_output: A structured catalog of all installed skills, agents, MCP servers, and plugins across global and local scopes
expectations: Output scans global skill directories (~/.claude/skills/, ~/.github/skills/, etc.)
Output scans the current repository for local agents, skills, and MCP config
Output is organized into categories (skills, agents, MCPs, plugins)
Output includes the source/platform for each resource
Output is readable and actionable — user can see what's available at a glance

evals.prompt: I need to know what research-related skills are available to me. Scan my environment and show me only research and information-gathering tools.
evals.expected_output: A filtered catalog showing only research-relevant skills and tools from the user's installed resources
expectations: Output filters results to show research-relevant skills
Output includes skill names and brief descriptions
Output distinguishes between locally installed and globally installed skills
Output indicates which platform each skill is available on
Output suggests the most relevant skill for research tasks if multiple options exist
